description.from: Deals ??? M.DMG that ignores enemy DEF, and heals 25% of DMG as HP.
description.to: Deals 871(1+0.3Skill Level)+500.2% of Attack Power as Magic Damage to an enemy and restores HP equal to 25% of the damage dealt. For 6 sec, reduces the target's Attack by 20% and increases your Attack by 10%. The Attack increase effect stacks up to 5 times.

description.from: Moves behind the furthest enemy and deals ??? M.DMG. Hit enemies take 30% increased M.DMG for 10 sec.
description.to:
Moves to the farthest enemy and deals 484(1+0.3Skill Level)+278% of Attack Power as Magic Damage to the target and nearby enemies, increasing their Magic Damage taken by 35% for 5 sec.
If enemies remain nearby after using the skill, additionally uses [Absorbing Strike].

description.from: Deals ??? M.DMG to all enemies in range. Gains CC immunity while using this skill.
description.to: Deals 458(1+0.3Skill Level)+263.6% of Attack Power as Magic Damage 4 times to enemies within range. You cannot be affected by status ailments while casting, and all damage taken is reduced by 50%.

description.from: When an enemy is killed by this hero, ATK is increased by ??? for 12 sec, and all skill cooldown is reduced by 30%.
description.to:
When an enemy is killed, all skill cooldowns are reduced by 30%, and [Harvest] is stacked 1 times.
[Harvest]: For 12 sec, Attack increases by 80(1+0.3Skill Level), stacking up to 10 times.

IV.from: Per each kill, recovers 1 orb of mana.
IV.to: When an enemy is killed, restores 1000 of your Mana.

dark.to: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but cooldown is reduced by 3 sec.

dark.from: Mana consumption is increased by 1, and upon using the skill, [Absorbing Blow] is activated. Cannot use when there are no enemies in range.
dark.to: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but damage is increased by 80%.

dark.from: DMG taken is reduced by 50% while skill is in use.
dark.to: Mana cost is increased by 2000, but [Harvest] is triggered once.

dark.from: While stack number is higher than 5, Mana is always at 100% and cooldowns are decreased by an additional 1 sec per each sec.
dark.to: If stacks are 5 or more, cooldown is additionally reduced by 1 sec every second.

description.from: [Absorbing Blow] Increases DMG by {0}% and upon killing an enemy, ATK is increased by 20% for 10 sec. ATK increase effect can be stacked up to max 3 times.
description.to: [Absorbing Blow] increases DMG by {0}% and resets its Cooldown upon killing an enemy.

description.from: [Devil's Prom] Mana cost is reduced by 1, and Crit DMG is increased by {0}%.
description.to: [Devil's Prom] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases DMG by {0}%.

dark.from: All of Epis's attacks decrease the M.DEF of hit enemies by 20% for 10 sec. ATK rises by 2% per each enemy hit. Maximum stack number is 10.
dark.to: When hitting with a skill, reduces the target's Magic Defense by 6% and increases your Attack by 6% for 10 sec. This effect stacks up to 6 times.

description.from: Upon attacking, there is a 25% chance of dealing {0}% of ATK as extra M.DMG, and ATK being increased by {1}% ATK boost can be stacked up to 10 times max.
description.to: On hit, has a 25% chance to deal additional Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power and increase your Attack by {1}%. The Attack increase stacks up to 10 times.
